name: Hickory Smoked Vinasoy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/4 cup of soy sauce (preferably Kikkoman or Tamari) with 1 cup of apple cider vinegar in a bottle.
2. Add 1 teaspoon of liquid smoke to the mixture.
3. Stir gently until well combined.
This recipe makes approximately 10 ounces, which is suitable for the size of the bottle used by the author. The soy sauce and vinegar work together to balance flavors, while the liquid smoke adds a strong BBQ-like taste. When using nutritional yeast, add a small amount of vinasoy to enhance its flavor.
